title: quercus × mellichampii
intro: Quercus × mellichampii, also known as the Mellichamp's oak, is a hybrid plant species in the beech family (Fagaceae) that is native to the southeastern United States. The leaves of the Quercus × mellichampii plant have been used in traditional medicine due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Quercus × mellichampii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule for medicinal use.
